content_of_post_to_comment: I don’t need much. Just a little peace, a little sunshine, and for nobody to explain to me why disrespect is ‘just a joke.’ Fck your ‘joke’ how about that.
comment: One thing I’ve noticed is that people often call disrespect a joke only after it lands badly. If it were truly a joke, the intent would be laughter; the fallback explanation is what makes it feel revealing.
